items.title: What Happens to Housing if Mortgage Rates Fall?
items.author: Ryan Reed
items.content: While the outlook for mortgage rates remains uncertain, a decline could unlock the housing market.

items.title: Seeing Red: When Is Fraud Not Fraud?
items.author: Rusty Adams
items.content: A dispute between two parties and a ruling from the Texas Supreme Court underscore the importance of looking for red flags in any negotiation.

items.title: U.S. Manufacturing Industry’s Winners and Losers
items.author: Bryan Pope
items.content: Despite flat national manufacturing employment, Texas has emerged as one of the nation's strongest job-growth leaders since 2020.
